name: artifact-flow
title: Artifact Flow
description: A focused boundary-validation example for versioned model output.

notes: Treat model output as untrusted and validate it before storage or rendering.
Artifact renderers remain responsible for semantic headings, labels, and keyboard interaction.

documentation.whenToUse: Use before persisting or rendering model-generated artifacts.
documentation.whenNotToUse: Do not use manual checks once the artifact contract becomes nested or user-extensible.
tradeoffs: The focused example uses manual checks; production applications should use a schema validator.
